descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: Average diameter of crystalline grains in the microstructure
descriptors.rationale: Controls strength via Hall-Petch relation and diffusion kinetics

representation.notes: Often log-normal distributed; mean or median grain diameter

quality.loss_reason: Full distribution collapsed to single scalar statistic
quality.truncation_error: spatial heterogeneity and distribution shape lost
quality.notes: Mean vs median choice affects representation; distribution information discarded

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: Angular difference in crystallographic orientation across grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: Determines boundary energy, mobility, and deformation resistance

representation.notes: Statistics of misorientation angle distribution; low/high angle fraction

quality.loss_reason: Distribution binned or reduced to moments
quality.truncation_error: spatial correlations and full distribution shape lost
quality.notes: Histogram binning loses fine detail; moments miss multimodality

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: Degree of preferred crystallographic orientation in polycrystalline aggregate
descriptors.rationale: Affects anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

representation.encoding: texture index or ODF maximum intensity
representation.notes: Single scalar metric from orientation distribution function

quality.loss_reason: Complete ODF reduced to single intensity metric
quality.truncation_error: texture type and symmetry information lost
quality.notes: Different texture types can yield identical intensity values

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total length of dislocation lines per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Governs strain hardening and stored deformation energy

quality.loss_reason: Dislocation types and spatial distribution not captured
quality.truncation_error: character and arrangement of dislocations lost
quality.notes: Total density ignores edge vs screw character and cell structure

descriptors.name: precipitate volume fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: Volume percentage of second-phase precipitate particles in matrix
descriptors.rationale: Controls precipitation strengthening and boundary pinning

representation.notes: Often paired with size/spacing for complete characterization

quality.loss_reason: Size distribution and spatial arrangement not encoded
quality.truncation_error: particle size, shape, and clustering lost
quality.notes: Same fraction can represent vastly different precipitate configurations

descriptors.name: stacking fault energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: Energy per unit area of stacking fault defects
descriptors.rationale: Determines dislocation dissociation, twinning, and deformation mechanisms

representation.notes: Material-specific intrinsic property; temperature and composition dependent

quality.notes: Intrinsic material property with unique value at given conditions

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Quantifies interface density affecting diffusion and mechanical response

representation.notes: Inversely proportional to grain size; Sv = k/d

quality.loss_reason: Derived from grain size; redundant encoding
quality.truncation_error: boundary type and network topology lost
quality.notes: Different grain geometries give same density; assumes spherical grains

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: Ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: Characterizes grain elongation and morphological anisotropy

representation.encoding: continuous value greater than or equal to 1
representation.notes: Unity indicates equiaxed grains; higher values show elongation

quality.loss_reason: Distribution and orientation of elongation not captured
quality.truncation_error: per-grain variation and directional anisotropy lost
quality.notes: Average ratio hides bimodal populations and spatial gradients

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: Volume fraction of newly formed strain-free grains
descriptors.rationale: Tracks microstructure evolution during annealing and recovery

representation.notes: Zero for fully deformed, unity for fully recrystallized state

quality.loss_reason: Spatial distribution and nucleation sites not encoded
quality.truncation_error: recrystallization kinetics and front morphology lost
quality.notes: Same fraction can represent uniform or clustered recrystallization
